changes.before: No deterministic governance proof command existed for MT-054 direct KERNEL-003 Docker/Docket consumer regressions.
changes.after: Added a Node guard that resolves the product worktree, scans kernel/storage Rust production roots, and fails closed on DocketAdapter, docket_adapter, DockerRunner, or docker_runner identifiers.
changes.rationale: The product code is already migrated; the durable guard prevents future kernel/storage consumers from bypassing SandboxAdapter injection.

changes.before: Kernel code was in MT-054 scope for possible direct KERNEL-003 Docker/Docket callsites.
changes.after: The source scan found no DocketAdapter, docket_adapter, DockerRunner, or docker_runner identifiers in the kernel production root.
changes.rationale: Kernel consumers remain free of concrete KERNEL-003 Docker/Docket surfaces and must continue to flow through adapter boundaries.

changes.before: Storage code was in MT-054 scope for possible direct KERNEL-003 Docker/Docket callsites.
changes.after: The source scan found no DocketAdapter, docket_adapter, DockerRunner, or docker_runner identifiers in the storage production root.
changes.rationale: Storage consumers remain free of concrete KERNEL-003 Docker/Docket surfaces and must continue to flow through adapter boundaries.

changes.before: Consumers could have been coupled to concrete KERNEL-003 Docker/Docket types instead of the KERNEL-004 sandbox abstraction.
changes.after: The KERNEL-004 `crate::sandbox::SandboxAdapter` trait is the adapter boundary for injected sandbox consumers.
changes.rationale: MT-054 is satisfied by consumer flow through the KERNEL-004 adapter abstraction, not direct Docker/Docket consumption.

changes.before: The repo contains a second `SandboxAdapter` trait under `kernel/sandbox`, which could be confused with the KERNEL-004 adapter boundary during review.
changes.after: The guard intentionally bans concrete Docket/Docker identifiers rather than `SandboxAdapter`, so the old internal KERNEL-003 trait is not treated as a Docker/Docket consumer.
changes.rationale: This preserves the MT-054 distinction between allowed adapter abstractions and forbidden concrete KERNEL-003 Docker/Docket surfaces.
